title: Japanese Corn Pancakes
description: A unique fusion of Japanese flavors in a fluffy American-style pancake with a sweet corn twist.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle to medium heat.
Mix pancake mix, eggs, milk, and melted butter in a bowl until smooth.
Add corn kernels and vanilla extract (if using) to the batter and mix well.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop batter onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface and edges start to dry.
Flip and cook for another 1-2 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm with your favorite toppings, such as maple syrup or fresh fruit.
